title: Medical device reports and publications - Canada.ca
content:
## Medical device reports and publications
Under the Food and Drugs Act, medical devices are health or medical instruments used in the treatment, mitigation, diagnosis or prevention of a disease or abnormal physical condition.
- Reports and publications
- Medical devices performance reports

## Reports and publications
This section contains links to reports and publications related to medical devices, including:
- Summary Basis of Decision documents
- Regulatory Decisions Summaries

## Medical devices performance reports
The medical devices performance reports provide detailed data about the timeliness of pre-market medical devices review process against the performance service standards. Each report is organized by parts of the regulations and the types of applications they include. The reports include statistics by submission type, showing:
- number in progress (workload)
- number of decisions made
- time to first decision, measured against cost recovery service standards
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Annual Performance Report for April 1, 2024 - March 31, 2025, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
For annual reports from 2013 to 2024, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q3 2025-26, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca.
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q2 2025-26, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca.
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q1 2025–26, contact, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q4 2024–25, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q3 2024–25, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q2 2024–25, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
- To request a full copy of the Medical Devices Directorate Performance Quarterly Report for Q1 2024–25, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
For quarterly reports from 2017 to 2023, contact publications@hc-sc.gc.ca .
For more information about the reports, contact the Medical Devices Directorate. Email: meddevices-instrumentsmed@hc-sc.gc.ca
